title: Great company to work for. The culture was the best one i have ever seen in any company with how inc
pros: Great company to work for. The culture was the best one i have ever seen in any company with how inclusive they are and they are willing to help everyone grow.

title: If you are familiar with Netflix, you have likely read its culture memo (or heard of it). What I res
pros: If you are familiar with Netflix, you have likely read its culture memo (or heard of it). What I respect most about Netflix and appreciate about its leadership, is that the memo is not simply words on a piece of paper (or font on a computer screen?). It is truly the fiber of how the company operates - enabling autonomy, hiring well, and getting out of the way. Many of its core values rooted in employee trust, and believing in them.

title: I've worked for Netflix Animation Studio since April 2019 and it has been a whirlwind experience in
pros: I've worked for Netflix Animation Studio since April 2019 and it has been a whirlwind experience in the best way.  Taking a pause to look back at what we accomplished in the moment, the flexibility of decision making, it's an amazing working environment for some who can deal without formalized structure for everything.  Amazing to work with Oscar and Globe winners and their staff.

pros:

pros: Fast-paced and things changing on the go, takes getting used to, but if you are on the right team you will be setup for success.

title: This is an American reality television series on Netflix. The premise revolves around the crew from
pros: This is an American reality television series on Netflix. The premise revolves around the crew from Gotham Garage, which has built a number of props for Movie studios and Television shows over the years. We built exotic and fun automobiles for show and sale.

title: I've worked with this company for over 7 months and the only consistency that I've found is that whi
pros: I've worked with this company for over 7 months and the only consistency that I've found is that while the middle management is incredible and the starting pay is excellent, the upper management is unreliable, sneaky and generally useless. I would avoid this company, the money isn't worth the hassle involved.

title: Worked here since 2009. Great job, but little to no growth opportunities.

pros: Great culture, fast-paced environment, not a lot of tolerance for nonsense, lots of freedom in your style of working (WFH, early / late hours, work environment), very little bureaucracy.
